cases.note: exponent-52 perturbation-f64; O(exponent) Horner delta step dominates

comment: Multibrot (exponent != 2) e2e grid case, kept out of grid-regression.json deliberately: at the default viewport it adds ~2-4 min per round per variant. Run on demand when touching the general-exponent kernels: node src/run-e2e.mjs --corpus corpus/grid-multibrot.json --viewport 800x600 --rounds 2 --warmup 0. The case is the e52 view from corpus.json (user-z48-0611aae8), the slowest real view in the events export.
